stations.name: Finch
stations.address: 5765 Yonge St, North York, ON M2M 3T6
stations.description: Finch is a vibrant multicultural hub anchored by a major bus terminal. Rich in Korean, Chinese, and South Asian restaurants — perfect for food tourism.

stations.name: North York Centre
stations.address: 5100 Yonge St, North York, ON M2N 5W1
stations.description: The civic heart of North York. Mel Lastman Square, the Toronto Public Library North York branch, Meridian Arts Centre, and City Hall are all steps away.

stations.name: Sheppard-Yonge
stations.address: 4 Sheppard Ave E, North York, ON M2N 5X5
stations.description: A major interchange station connecting two subway lines. Gateway to the Yonge-Sheppard Centre mall, Whole Foods, and upscale dining. Busiest pedestrian flow in North York.
